bugs.description: Excessive memory usage: the code creates three separate n×m 2‑D arrays (free_neighbors, non_forceable_count, forceable). For the maximum size (n·m = 10⁶, e.g., n=10⁶, m=1) this exceeds typical memory limits (≈250 MB) and can cause MLE.

Excessive memory usage: the code creates three separate n×m 2‑D arrays (free_neighbors, non_forceable_count, forceable). For the maximum size (n·m = 10⁶, e.g., n=10⁶, m=1) this exceeds typical memory limits (≈250 MB) and can cause MLE.
